_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Mirdametinib reduced ERK1/2 phosphorylation and had slight effects on RB1 phosphorylation, as expected
details: Reduced ERK1/2 phosphorylation and had slight effects on RB1 phosphorylation
